stemHtml: A radar controller provides traffic information. Which situation most likely requires you to change heading soon?

options.a: TWO O'CLOCK, SIX MILES, SAME DIRECTION, 500 FEET ABOVE, CLIMBING.
options.b: ONE O'CLOCK, THREE MILES, CROSSING LEFT TO RIGHT, SAME LEVEL.
options.c: TWELVE O'CLOCK, FIVE MILES, OPPOSITE DIRECTION, SAME LEVEL.
options.d: ELEVEN O'CLOCK, SIX MILES, CLOSING, 500 FEET BELOW DESCENDING.
